description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a test stage and a test1 job using the node:latest Docker image, with a mongo:latest service aliased as mongo and a DATABASE_URL variable set to mongo. Include a global before_script and after_script that both run the date command. In the test1 job, run a before_script that executes git submodule update --init --recursive, date, yarn install --silent, and date, cache the node_modules/ directory, then run a script that calls node --version, date, and yarn test, using the mongo service and tagging the job with docker and gce.
